description_en: PME MTL is the Montreal business support network funded by the City of Montreal. It offers free advisory services, financing, and funding to SMEs operating in Montreal.
description_fr: PME MTL est le réseau de soutien aux entreprises de Montréal, financé par la Ville. Il offre des services-conseils gratuits, du financement et des subventions.

services.description_en: Access to business advisors for strategic planning, financial analysis, and market development — free of charge
Loans for Montreal-based startups in early stages
services.eligibility_en: Registered business in Montreal, viable project, unable to obtain full financing from traditional sources

services.description_en: Loans for established SMEs looking to scale

eligibility.location: Must operate or plan to operate in Montreal
